ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the project is for */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Open, In-Progress, Closed) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., Open, In-Progress, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated hours required for the task */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "is_milestone" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task is a milestone */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., Project Manager, Team Lead, Developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team member belongs to */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the team member */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the team member */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team member is active */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member the task is assigned to */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the task was completed */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the task completion (e.g., Completed, In-Progress) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the task completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task update */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being updated */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member updating the task */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the task was updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the team member */,
  "completion_percentage" REAL /* Completion percentage of the task */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Time spent on the task update */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* Attachments related to the task update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_updates_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_updates_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the cost is associated with */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost amount */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the cost was incurred */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., labor, materials) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number if applicable */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the cost (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
